---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the broker, wrapper model, docs, demos, or release shape
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the workflow problem or limitation.

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful improvement.

## Why this fits latchkeyd

Explain how the request aligns with:

- local-first trust mediation
- explicit secret handoff
- narrow command surfaces
- fail-closed behavior

## Alternatives considered

Describe other approaches if relevant.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or examples.
